# Data Source (hush_elasticsearch_access_privilege)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an Elasticsearch access privilege in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_elasticsearch_access_privilege" "example" {
  id = "apr-eu12345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Elasticsearch access privilege

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the Elasticsearch access privilege
- `grant` (List of Object) The grant configuration for the privilege (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--grant))
- `name` (String) The name of the Elasticsearch access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedatt--grant"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grant`

Read-Only:

- `cluster` (List of String)
- `indices` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--grant--indices))

<a id="nestedatt--grant--indices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grant.indices`

Read-Only:

- `names` (List of String)
- `privileges` (List of String)
